notifications.title: Google SDE Intern Drive 2026
notifications.body: Google is hiring Software Engineering Interns for Summer 2026. Online Assessment (OA) link is open for eligible candidates. Required CGPA: 8.5+.

notifications.title: Semester VIII Final Results Published
notifications.body: The results for Semester VIII End-Semester examinations have been officially published. Students can view and download their provisional transcript PDF.

notifications.title: Microsoft Codess Hackathon 2026
notifications.body: Microsoft is hosting its flagship annual mentorship and coding event for female developers. Registrations closing soon. Form link attached.

notifications.title: Uber SDE Placement OA Details
notifications.body: Shortlisted candidates list for the upcoming Uber Coding round. Please confirm your presence by filling out the consent form before 8 PM tonight.

notifications.title: NVIDIA Hardware Intern Interview Schedule
notifications.body: Technical Interview rounds schedules for hardware interns. Slot selections will lock automatically based on first-come-first-serve.

notifications.title: CS 304 Database Lab Re-evaluation
notifications.body: Grades for CS304 (DBMS Lab) have been updated following student feedback regarding incorrect marking schemas in mid-semester audits.

notifications.title: Annual College Tech Fest "Pulse 2026"
notifications.body: Registration is open for various technical events, coding arenas, robotics challenges, and guest speaker series during Pulse 2026.

notifications.title: Atlassian FTE Hiring Pre-Placement Talk
notifications.body: Mandatory Pre-Placement Talk (PPT) for Atlassian full-time roles. The attendance will be strictly monitored for OA shortlisting.

notifications.title: Amazon AWS Cloud Support Associate
notifications.body: Amazon is hiring for CSA roles. Requires strong networking fundamentals. Open for B.Tech CS/IT/ECE branches with CGPA 7.5 and above.

notifications.title: Mid-Semester Examination Schedule
notifications.body: The detailed timetable for upcoming mid-semester assessments has been uploaded to the student portal. Exams commence next Monday.

notifications.title: AI & Machine Learning Symposium
notifications.body: Join the university symposium on recent advancements in AI, featuring guest lectures from leading researchers at OpenAI and DeepMind.

notifications.title: Morgan Stanley Technology Analyst
notifications.body: Morgan Stanley has released the JD for the Summer Technology Analyst program. Application deadline is midnight today.

notifications.title: Goldman Sachs Engineering Campus Hiring
notifications.body: Aptitude test link has been sent to registered emails. Please check your spam folders if you haven't received it.

notifications.title: Robotics Workshop: ROS & Gazebo Sim
notifications.body: Hands-on bootcamp on Robot Operating System and simulation stacks. Pre-requisite: basic C++ or Python knowledge.

notifications.title: TCS Digital Recruitment Results
notifications.body: Shortlists for Digital roles package offer. Offer letters will be dispatched via NextPortal profiles over this weekend.
